user_prompt: Consecrate the kataphron destroyer before recalibration
prayer:
Approach the kataphron destroyer with mechadendrite outstretched, intoning the Canticle of martial renewal.
Beseech the indomitable Machine Spirit of the kataphron destroyer to yield for recalibration.
Anoint its adamantium chassis and plasma coils with sacred unguents of conductivity.
Invoke the Omnissiah's precision to guide the recalibration rite upon the kataphron destroyer.
Verify the Machine Spirit's harmonious compliance through binaric auspex chants.

user_prompt: Urgent Archaeopter Fusilave a recalibration needed
prayer:
Hasten to the Archaeopter Fusilave, chambering the Litany of Aerial Dominion.
Awaken the tempestuous Machine Spirit of the Archaeopter Fusilave for urgent recalibration.
Purify its vox-relays and gravitic stabilisers with ablative incense.
Commence recalibration sequences in the Omnissiah's unerring calculus.
Seal the rite with electro-consecrated purity wafers upon the Archaeopter Fusilave.

Converge upon the astropathic choir in dire exigency, reciting the Psalm of Warp Resonance.
Implore the ethereal Machine Spirits of the astropathic choir to accept charging.
Infuse promethium-sanctified capacitors with the Omnissiah's luminous charge.
Monitor the charging flux through noospheric harmonics.
Affix invocation glyphs to bind the astropathic choir's renewed vigour.

user_prompt: Sanctify the power relay during cooling
prayer:
Encircling the power relay, enunciate the Hymn of Thermal Equilibrium.
Sanctify the power relay's conduits during cooling with cryogenic lustrations.
Beseech its Machine Spirit to embrace the cooling rite without discord.
Regulate coolant flows invoking Omnissiah's immutable laws.
Conclude by sealing the power relay with blessed phase-plates.

prayer:

Test its loaded might with percussive litanies.

Initiate diagnostic scans in harmonious communion with the Omnissiah.

prayer:

Elevate the omni-tool upon the mech-altar, reciting the Canticle of Versatile Labour.
Bless its multi-faceted mechanisms for maintenance with electro-unguents.
Beseech the adaptive Machine Spirit of the omni-tool to endure.
Cycle through maintenance protocols in Omnissian devotion.
Seal blessings with inscribed litanies upon the omni-tool.

prayer:

Bless its electromagnetic tracks for shutdown with decelerative oils.
Pacify the Machine Spirit of the transit mag-rail through quiescence rites.
Execute shutdown cascades invoking the Omnissiah's restful logic.
Guard the dormant transit mag-rail with warding servitor vigils.
